# 🎬 React Video Comments

✨ A modern video player interface with a clean and dynamic comments section built using **React + Vite**.

---

## 🚀 Overview

This project replicates a simple video streaming UI with a comments section, similar to platforms like YouTube. It focuses on **component-based architecture** and **dynamic rendering in React**.

---

## 🖼️ Features

* 🎥 Video player with controls
* 💬 Dynamic comments rendering
* 👤 Auto-generated user initials
* ⚡ Fast performance using Vite
* 🎨 Minimal and clean UI

---

## 🛠️ Tech Stack

* ⚛️ React
* ⚡ Vite
* 🎨 CSS3

---

## 📂 Folder Structure

```bash
react-video-comments/
│
├── src/
│   ├── components/
│   │   └── CommentItem/
│   ├── App.js
│   ├── App.css
│
├── public/
├── package.json
└── README.md
```

---

## ⚙️ Getting Started

### 1. Clone the repository

```bash
git clone https://github.com/aviatrix999/react-video-comments.git
```

### 2. Navigate to project

```bash
cd react-video-comments
```

### 3. Install dependencies

```bash
npm install
```

### 4. Run the app

```bash
npm run dev
```

---

## 🧠 How It Works

* A list of comments is stored as an array
* Each comment is passed as props to a component
* The UI is rendered dynamically using `.map()`
* The first letter of each username is used as an avatar

---

## 🌱 Future Improvements

* ✍️ Add new comments
* 🗑️ Delete comments
* ❤️ Like / dislike feature
* 🔗 Backend integration (API)
* 🎯 Real-time updates
